race.comment: LEMMOR FILOU (11) improved quickly last start, sitting on the speed and ending up 0.9L off the winner at Bunbury. She'll be better again for the last start effort and a better draw this time around is a big tick. Can sit handy again and with more experience under her belt, she can go one better. EIGHTYSEVEN LAD (2) won a trial coming into the campaign and missed first-up by 0.4L as the race favourite. Drawn better this time and with the fresh run behind him, he looks ready to go to the next level. Has plenty of upside and can play a leading role. DANCE OF DRAGONS (8) is ready for his debut, winning his latest trial at Belmont in readiness for this. Watson has partnered with him at the trials and hops back on board for his debut. Can make an impression. PEMBETON (1) looks better suited back to this trip second-up and an improved run is on the cards. MAHLER'S MELODY (9) won't be far away.
